war_arms.quote: War, war without truce upon him who means to sully the blazon of the Homeland
war_arms.rationale: explicit, repeated calls to war across stanzas 1, 5, 6, 10; cannons thunder in mountain and valley

blood_death.quote: your countrysides will be watered with blood and in blood will be their footprints
blood_death.rationale: literal blood imagery dominant in stanzas 5 and 6

enemy_threat.quote: upon him who means to sully the blazon of the Homeland
enemy_threat.rationale: an othered would-be defiler/invader is named as the war's target

sacrifice.quote: Your sons swear to breathe out their breath on your altars
sacrifice.rationale: stanza 10 is a vow to die for the homeland when the war-clarion calls

deity.quote: in heaven your eternal destiny has been written by the hand of God
deity.rationale: divine archangel of peace and the hand of God in the first stanza

land_nature.quote: In the mountains and the valley, the dreadful cannons thunder
land_nature.rationale: mountains/valleys appear only as the battlefield backdrop

glory_pride.quote: Your forehead shall be girded, oh fatherland, with olive garlands
glory_pride.rationale: homeland crowned with honour/glory framing the call to arms

war_arms.quote: Mexicans, at the cry of war, make ready the steel and the bridle
war_arms.rationale: the sung chorus + stanza 1 is itself a call to arms

deity.quote: in heaven your eternal destiny has been written by the hand of God
deity.rationale: the divine archangel and hand of God appear in the sung stanza 1

glory_pride.quote: Your forehead shall be girded, oh fatherland, with olive garlands
glory_pride.rationale: honour/olive-crown imagery central to sung portion

land_nature.quote: and may the earth tremble at its centre at the resounding roar of the cannon
land_nature.rationale: earth invoked only as setting for the cannon

war_arms.quote: Soldiers of Vietnam, marching onward... The distant rumbling of guns mingles with our marching song
war_arms.rationale: marching soldiers, guns, and the battlefield organise the whole text

blood_death.quote: Our flag, red with the blood of victory, bears the spirit of the country
blood_death.rationale: blood of victory and bodies of foes are explicit

enemy_threat.quote: The path to glory is built by the bodies of our foes
enemy_threat.rationale: foes named as the substance of the road to glory

sacrifice.quote: United in determination to save the nation
sacrifice.rationale: the resistance is framed as collective sacrifice for the nation

unity_brotherhood.quote: Onward! All together advancing! For one eternal Vietnam

glory_pride.quote: The path to glory is built by the bodies of our foes
glory_pride.rationale: glory is a named goal of the march

war_arms.quote: Soldiers of Vietnam, marching onward... The distant rumbling of guns mingles with our marching song
war_arms.rationale: verse 1 (the sung verse) is dominated by soldiers and guns

blood_death.quote: Our flag, red with the blood of victory, bears the spirit of the country
blood_death.rationale: blood of victory and bodies of foes in sung verse

enemy_threat.quote: The path to glory is built by the bodies of our foes
enemy_threat.rationale: foes explicitly named in sung verse

sacrifice.quote: United in determination to save the nation
sacrifice.rationale: collective sacrifice for the nation in sung verse

unity_brotherhood.quote: Onward! All together advancing! For one eternal Vietnam

glory_pride.quote: The path to glory is built by the bodies of our foes
glory_pride.rationale: glory named as goal

war_arms.quote: Hasten to battle, men of Bayamo
war_arms.rationale: the entire official verse is a call to run to battle

blood_death.quote: Do not fear a glorious death, for to die for the homeland is to live
blood_death.rationale: death for the homeland is the verse's pivot

sacrifice.quote: for to die for the homeland is to live
sacrifice.rationale: martyrdom for the nation is the central organising idea

freedom_liberty.quote: To live in chains is to live mired in shame and disgrace
freedom_liberty.rationale: rejection of chains/bondage as the motive for battle

glory_pride.quote: For the homeland looks proudly to you
glory_pride.rationale: the homeland watching with pride

war_arms.quote: Hasten to battle, men of Bayamo
war_arms.rationale: only this first verse is sung and it is a call to battle

blood_death.quote: Do not fear a glorious death, for to die for the homeland is to live
blood_death.rationale: death for the homeland in the sole sung verse

sacrifice.quote: for to die for the homeland is to live
sacrifice.rationale: martyrdom central to the sung verse

freedom_liberty.quote: To live in chains is to live mired in shame and disgrace

glory_pride.quote: For the homeland looks proudly to you
glory_pride.rationale: homeland's pride

war_arms.quote: With the resolve of the winds and the fire of the guns
war_arms.rationale: guns and the fighting fida'i/warrior recur across verses

blood_death.quote: With the longing in my blood for my land and my home
blood_death.rationale: blood imagery and 'volcano of my revenge' recur

enemy_threat.quote: Palestine is my revenge and the land of endurance
enemy_threat.rationale: an unnamed foe is implied by revenge/return, never named

sacrifice.quote: Warrior, warrior, warrior, oh my people, oh people of eternity
sacrifice.rationale: the title 'Fida'i' (self-sacrificer) and the vow to remain a fighter until the country returns make sacrifice the central theme

land_nature.quote: I have climbed the mountains and fought the wars
land_nature.rationale: mountains appear as terrain of struggle, not celebrated landscape

freedom_liberty.quote: I have conquered the impossible, and crossed the frontiers
freedom_liberty.rationale: liberation/return and smashing the shackles are explicit

unity_brotherhood.quote: My country, my land, land of my ancestors
unity_brotherhood.rationale: 'my people, people of eternity' invokes a single people

glory_pride.quote: By the oath under the shade of the flag
glory_pride.rationale: flag and oath carry national pride

blood_death.quote: With the longing in my blood for my land and my home
blood_death.rationale: blood and volcanic revenge in sung verse 1

sacrifice.quote: Warrior, warrior, warrior, oh my people, oh people of eternity
sacrifice.rationale: the fida'i/self-sacrificer is the chorus's dominant figure

freedom_liberty.quote: I have conquered the impossible, and crossed the frontiers

land_nature.quote: I have climbed the mountains and fought the wars
land_nature.rationale: mountains as struggle terrain

unity_brotherhood.quote: My country, my land, land of my ancestors

war_arms.quote: Let us all fight, every one of us, for our black country
war_arms.rationale: a single generalised call to fight, no weapons named

blood_death.quote: And if we have to die, what does it really matter?
blood_death.rationale: a passing acceptance of dying in verse 3

sacrifice.quote: And if we have to die, what does it really matter? Our children everywhere will be able to say how triumph comes through battle
sacrifice.rationale: explicit willingness to die for the country's triumph

land_nature.quote: From the forest to the savannah, from the savannah to the sea
land_nature.rationale: geography sweeps forest/savannah/sea in verse 2

freedom_liberty.quote: Let us all, with wild joyfulness, sing the song of freedom
freedom_liberty.rationale: freedom celebrated at independence in verse 1

unity_brotherhood.quote: Arise, Congolese, proud every man, proclaim the unity of our nation
unity_brotherhood.rationale: unity ('one people, one soul, one heart') is the anthem's central theme and motto

glory_pride.quote: Arise, Congolese, proud every man
glory_pride.rationale: national pride recurs in chorus and verse 2

freedom_liberty.quote: Let us all, with wild joyfulness, sing the song of freedom

unity_brotherhood.quote: Arise, Congolese, proud every man, proclaim the unity of our nation
unity_brotherhood.rationale: the sung verse 1 + chorus centre on unity and the Unity/Work/Progress motto

glory_pride.quote: Arise, Congolese, proud every man
glory_pride.rationale: national pride in sung chorus

war_arms.quote: The Romanian Nation, your great grandchildren, with weapons in their arms, with your fire in their veins
war_arms.rationale: weapons, battle and the cry 'Life in freedom or death' run through the official stanzas

blood_death.quote: That in these veins still flows a Roman blood
blood_death.rationale: Roman blood and 'better to die in battle' are explicit

enemy_threat.quote: from your deadly sleep into which you've been sunk by the barbaric tyrants
enemy_threat.rationale: barbaric tyrants and enemies who must bow are a central foil

sacrifice.quote: Better to die in battle in with eternal glory, than to once again be slaves on our ancient lands

deity.quote: Priests, lead with your crucifixes, for our army is Christian
deity.rationale: stanza 11 invokes a Christian army led by priests with crucifixes

land_nature.quote: than to once again be slaves on our ancient lands
land_nature.rationale: 'ancient lands' as patrimony, not described landscape

freedom_liberty.quote: Its motto is liberty and its goal all too holy
freedom_liberty.rationale: liberty / 'Life in freedom or death' is the anthem's driving demand

unity_brotherhood.quote: Now or never let's give proof to the world
unity_brotherhood.rationale: a collective national 'we' but no explicit fraternity

glory_pride.quote: The victor in his battles, the name of Trajan!
glory_pride.rationale: pride in Roman/Trajan ancestry and 'eternal glory'

enemy_threat.quote: from your deadly sleep into which you've been sunk by the barbaric tyrants
enemy_threat.rationale: the customarily sung first stanza is built around the barbaric tyrants/enemies

freedom_liberty.quote: Now, or never, your fate renew, to which your enemies will bow to

glory_pride.quote: Now, or never, your fate renew
glory_pride.rationale: renewal of national fate carries pride

war_arms.quote: Peace, not war, shall be our boast, but, should foes assail our coast, make us then a mighty host
war_arms.rationale: verse 3 raises war, foes and a 'Lord of battles' despite a peace preference

enemy_threat.quote: Lord of battles, in Thy might, put our enemies to flight

deity.quote: God of Nations at Thy feet, in the bonds of love we meet
deity.rationale: the anthem is a prayer to God; 'God defend New Zealand' is its refrain

land_nature.quote: Guard Pacific's triple star from the shafts of strife and war
land_nature.rationale: the Pacific land/'triple star' is the thing prayed over

freedom_liberty.rationale: 'free land' a passing mention, not the focus

unity_brotherhood.quote: In the bonds of love we meet
unity_brotherhood.rationale: bonds of love among the people

glory_pride.quote: Make her praises heard afar
glory_pride.rationale: wish for the nation's praises to spread

deity.quote: God of Nations at Thy feet, in the bonds of love we meet... God defend our free land
deity.rationale: the sung verse 1 is a sustained prayer to God

war_arms.quote: Guard Pacific's triple star from the shafts of strife and war
war_arms.rationale: strife/war appear once, as something to be guarded against

land_nature.quote: Guard Pacific's triple star from the shafts of strife and war
land_nature.rationale: the Pacific land is the subject of the prayer

unity_brotherhood.quote: In the bonds of love we meet

glory_pride.quote: Make her praises heard afar
glory_pride.rationale: wish for nation's praise

enemy_threat.quote: O my homeland, be for ever free, safe from every foe!
enemy_threat.rationale: verse 2 names an unspecified foe to be kept safe from

land_nature.rationale: the Nile and Egypt-as-land are explicit subjects

freedom_liberty.quote: O my homeland, be for ever free, safe from every foe!
freedom_liberty.rationale: a single wish for the homeland to be free

glory_pride.quote: Egypt! Most precious jewel, shining on the brow of eternity!

land_nature.quote: How can one count the blessings of the Nile for mankind?

glory_pride.quote: Egypt! O mother of all lands, my hope and my ambition
glory_pride.rationale: reverent pride in Egypt as 'mother of all lands'

sacrifice.rationale: explicit willingness to lay down lives for the Sultan

monarch.rationale: saving the king is the sung climax

land_nature.quote: We know that thou hath blessed our land
land_nature.rationale: blessed land mentioned

unity_brotherhood.quote: As your people, we trust thee

land_nature.quote: O happy Rome, O noble Rome

glory_pride.quote: Iceland's thousand years
glory_pride.rationale: the millennium celebrated in sung verse
